# kSecAttrSalt

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the salt to use for this item.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrSalt: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] that indicates the salt to use with this cryptographic key.
title: kSecAttrSalt
